name: Azura's Crystals
short_description: Embark on an enchanting quest as Azura, a spirited heroine, and discover a world of ancient mysticism. Forge unbreakable bonds with mythical creatures using the power of Primalis Crystals. Traverse breathtaking landscapes, make difficult choices, and uncover the secrets that shape your destiny.
detailed_description:
Follow Azura, a curious and nature-loving adventurer, as she uncovers the secrets of the mysterious Vesperians, and their connection to the Primalis Crystals.

Explore various landscapes, meet creatures and solve puzzles, and make choices that will shape your destiny.

Features:

  • Story-Driven Exploration: Uncover ancient lore and unravel the mystery of the Primalis as Azura continues on her journey

  • Dynamic Combat: Defeat enemies using a combination of elemental crystal powers. Summon mighty Vesperians to aid in battle

  • Crafting & Resource Management: Gather resources from your surroundings, and craft tools, potions, and upgrades to aid you in your journey.

  • Puzzle-Solving: Test your wit with environmental puzzles

  • Stunning Environments: Explore a variety of landscapes, from serene forests to treacherous caves and ruins, each environment is flush with its own unique flora and fauna

  • Vesperians: Harness the power of the mighty Vesperians that can help you in combat, research, and exploration. Each Vesperian offers unique abilities that can be upgraded over time.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Portuguese - Portugal, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Italian
